creator: ron@scheckelhoff.org
text:
Kernel panic experienced with FreeBSD-10.0-CURRENT while running the
chromium browser application.  Had been using the operating system,
and running the application "Chromium 27.0" for four hours.  Accessed
a page on Wordpress.com and experienced the kernel panic.  Had been
viewing many pages on Wordpress throughout four hour period prior to
panic.  System message log entries follow:

Jul 16 00:22:06 steelhullketch syslogd: kernel boot file is /boot/kernel/kernel
Jul 16 00:22:06 steelhullketch kernel: lock order reversal:
Jul 16 00:22:06 steelhullketch kernel: 1st 0xc61c74a4 ufs (ufs) @/usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_syscalls.c:3473

Jul 16 00:22:06 steelhullketch kernel: 2nd 0xc4a28858 bufwait (bufwait) @ /usr/src/sys/ufs/ffs/ffs_vnops.c:262

Jul 16 00:22:06 steelhullketch kernel: 3rd 0xc61c7388 ufs (ufs) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_subr.c:2099
